perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman wearing a dark purple off-shoulder top and a beret standing in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding a long Harry Potter-themed box. (2) Another woman in a light pink dress joins her, and they both hold the product while posing and pointing at it with excited expressions. (3) The scene cuts to close-up shots of the product on the shelves, showing the 'Harry Potter Hogwarts Express' branding and the chocolate biscuits inside. (4) The two women return to the frame, standing side-by-side to demonstrate the height of the product box relative to their bodies. (5) They continue talking and gesturing toward the product, ending with a call to action while pointing at the bottom of the screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with upbeat, high-tempo pop music featuring synthesized melodies and a strong beat. (2) Two female voices speak in Mandarin with high-pitched, enthusiastic tones, discussing the product's features and price. (3) Occasional bright, cartoonish sound effects (swooshes and dings) are used to emphasize transitions and text overlays. (4) The background music remains constant and energetic throughout the video, ending with a final enthusiastic verbal sign-off from the speakers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear throughout the video, translating the spoken dialogue about the Harry Potter snacks at Costco. (2) Decorative Text: Large, colorful captions such as 'Harry Potter', '哈利波特車票' (Harry Potter Ticket), '超巨大巧克力餅乾' (Super Giant Chocolate Biscuit), and '649元' (the price) appear with various animations. (3) Call-to-Action: A text prompt at the end asks viewers to '留言' (comment) if they want to see an unboxing video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Feature Showcase -> Price/Value Discussion -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators in the foreground, with approximately 3 shoppers visible as blurred figures in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a dark purple off-shoulder blouse and a dark beret. The other is wearing a light pink sleeveless dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse setting with tall industrial shelving, stacks of red snack boxes, and other shoppers in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Details -> Engagement -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional review and shopping discovery vlog. It aims to generate excitement around a novelty Harry Potter-themed giant chocolate biscuit box found at Costco, leveraging the hosts' enthusiastic personalities and interactive questioning to drive social media engagement and comments.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of the product, detailed description of its contents and price, and clear identification of the retailer (Costco).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Dynamic female duo hosting, high-density variety-show style text overlays, and a focus on trending warehouse club items.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows standard high-engagement short-form content trends, using specific hooks (Harry Potter) and interactive elements (asking for unboxing comments) to optimize for social media algorithms.
